playbook.intent: Run a sustainable single-source content cadence — one weekly action that fans out to X, IH, newsletter — without burning out on a nomad schedule.
playbook.scope: Run a sustainable single-source content cadence — one weekly action that fans out to X, IH, newsletter — without burning out on a nomad schedule.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Pick the weekly anchor
stage.intent: One main piece per week, fan out from there.

tasks.task: Choose an anchor format (essay, build log, teardown)
Set the topic for the next 4 weeks

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when slot + topics are on the calendar.

stage.name: Single-source draft

tasks.task: Slice into: tweet thread, IH post, newsletter, X repost

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when all slices are scheduled.

stage.name: Low-energy fallback mode
stage.intent: Stay alive on nomad / bad weeks.

tasks.task: Set a rule: ship fallback if low energy hits

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when fallbacks exist before they are needed.

stage.name: Engagement loop
stage.intent: 30 minutes of replies before each post.

tasks.task: List 5-10 accounts to reply to before publishing

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when engagement ritual runs each week.

stage.name: Weekly retro + adjust

tasks.task: Adjust the next weeks format mix

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when retro is committed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content build-in-public-weekly-cadence-x-ih-newsletter-single-source --format md, agent: faion get-content build-in-public-weekly-cadence-x-ih-newsletter-single-source --format context, json: faion get-content build-in-public-weekly-cadence-x-ih-newsletter-single-source --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
